ActuatorName.description: Closed set of actuators (physical-system-single.md §Outputs); kept in sync with the MQTT actuator-state contract. irrigation_valve is per-zone.

ActuatorOutputState.description: Unified actuator output shape (mirrors the MQTT actuator-state output `$defs/state`, used there for both commanded and observed): `level_pct` is null for pure on/off devices (misters, co2_injector, irrigation_valve) and 0–100 for variable/modulating ones (fans, roof_vents, grow_lights, shade_screen, modulating heater).

on.description: Whether the actuator is energized / open.

level_pct.description: Output level for variable/modulating actuators; null for pure on/off devices.
